_meta.comment: All user-visible text lives here. Add new language files (es.json, fr.json, etc.) as siblings. Loaded by godot/scripts/text.gd autoload; access via Text.get('main_menu.title'). Templates use {placeholder} substitution via Text.format('key', {var: value}).

level.hint: drag to steer. tap MENU to leave.

win_screen.title: BOUNTY!
win_screen.subtitle_template:
{n} posse members made it.
whatever that's worth.

candy_rustler_dialog_intro: WELL, RUSTLE MY WRAPPERS! Fresh sugar struttin' into MY territory!
Ya unwrap this whole frontier an' pitch the rest aside?! I AM the rest!
candy_rustler_dialog_taunts: RASSA-FRACKIN' sugar-tramps — hold STILL so's I can crinkle ya!
Every wrapper ya ever balled up an' threw away? It's ME now!
C'mere, c'mere — I just wanna give ya a little... CRINKLE.
I'm FIT TO BE TIED — an' I'm MADE outta twist-ties!
candy_rustler_dialog_when_hit: Rrrgh — that's comin' straight outta yer DEPOSIT!
candy_rustler_dialog_dying: Noooo! I'm comin' apart at the SEEEAMS!
